name: Boiled Corn Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the chicken or fish broth to a boil in a large pot, then add butter.
2. In a separate bowl, whisk together the oatmeal, flour, baking powder, sugar, and salt.
3. In another bowl, mix together the corn kernels (peeled), egg, and milk.
4. Gradually stir the corn mixture into the dry ingredients until well combined.
5. Carefully pour spoonfuls of the batter into the boiling broth.
6. Reduce heat to low and cover the pot. Simmer for 15-18 minutes.
7. Remove from heat and serve as a thick pudding to replace potatoes.
